tender.description: Replacement of old and damaged/settled undersized RCC sewer line with 500 mm dia SN8 sewer line from near T-point (in Front of Nigam Pratibha School)-adjacent to BSES Office and Shani Mandir (H No. B-114), to near Bhuteshwar Mandir, along Main Kanti
